sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n79027" key="paraflo/gisma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παραφλόγισμα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n79027.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">savoury roasted dish</tr_>, in pl., <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0309.tlg001:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Achae.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
